creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 250366
patch v1

Hi!

I've tested the attached update to 3.13.0.

It works fine here, and builds fine in poudriere for supported releases.

The patch also removes a bunch of PORTSDOCS from the plist. Poudriere reports duplicated files.

I think these files are already handled by the DOCS_VARS=              PORTDOCS=* part of the Makefile that adds content of DOCSDIR to the plist automatically.

Thanks in advance for any feedback!
